_comment: macOS/Linux managed policy for Google Chrome. Linux: place at /etc/opt/chrome/policies/managed/hardass.json. macOS: convert to a configuration profile / plist for com.google.Chrome. Extension ID: mdfcmhkfkelkdhjbjddmkmjkmobijbgc
_comment_3rdparty: Zero-touch enrolment: push the team's server URL + enrollment code straight into the extension so it self-enrols on first launch with no user input. Replace the two values below with the tenant's own. Read by autoEnrollFromManagedConfig() via chrome.storage.managed (schema: extension/managed_schema.json).
